articles.author: Sarah Perez
articles.title: We tried Google’s AI glasses and they’re almost there - TechCrunch
articles.description: Google demoed prototype Android XR glasses that overlay Gemini-powered translation, navigation, and other information directly into your field of view.
articles.content: At the Google I/O developer conference this week, we had the opportunity for a brief hands-on with Google’s upcoming AI-powered glasses — not the audio-only glasses that the company said will begin s… [+8781 chars]

articles.description: It is imperative to concentrate resources towards the highest priority objectives."
